dialog1.1:
1. To what component of the ecosystem does the salmon go to?
               a. Abiotic
                b. Biotic
                c.  Prokaryotic
                d. Eukaryotic
dialog1.2:
2. To what component of the ecosystem does helium go?
                a. Skeletal
                b. Respiratory
                c. Integumentary
                d. Digestive
dialog1.3:
3. Which ones should we avoid to save the ecosystem?
I. Throwing plastic bottles away
II. Saving water
III. Killing animals for self perks.
                a. I only
                b. II only
                c. I and III
                d. All of them.
dialog1.4:
4. [Bonus(If you get this correct, you get the animal veterinarian achievement)]

Which one belongs to the desert biome?
                a. Northern white rhinoceros
                b. Gecko
                c. Egyptian tortoise
                d. None of the above
dialog1.5:
5. What is an ecosystem?
                a. A geographical place where we live
                b. Structural buildings
                c. Where abiotic things take place.
                d. All of the above

dialog2.1: 1.The Nervous system is “the only thing” that helps with communicating.
dialog2.3: 3.The “nervous” system is not a reliable way for communication. It's only used for body protection.

dialog_ans1.correct: You are correct! You can now move on to the next question!
dialog_ans1.incorrect1: You are incorrect! You have one more chance
